title: The Same Childhood Stress Gives One Person IBS and Another Chronic Constipation. New Research Finally Explains Why.
description: For decades, stress-related gut disorders have been treated as a single problem with a single mechanism. A 2026 study combining mouse models and thousands of children just proved that wrong — and in doing so, exposed why most current treatments are missing the target. The gut doesn't just remember stress. It remembers it in multiple, distinct biological languages.
heroImageAlt: Editorial illustration for The Same Childhood Stress Gives One Person IBS and Another Chronic Constipation. New Research Finally Explains Why.
